TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Leo_Barnhorst, title = Leo_Barnhorst, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leo_Barnhorst} }

S.FORM: Leo Barnhorst sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 5, Leo Barnhorst, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
Leo Barnhorst sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 5, Leo Barnhorst, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: leo βarnħors~ɕt s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, leo βarnħors~ɕt, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
